tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Articles (A, An, The).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Articles (A, An, The) का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I need a book. I need an apple. The book is on the table. The sun rises in the east. I saw a dog.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Articles (A, An, The).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Articles (A, An, The) का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The dog is very cute. This is a good idea. That idea worked well. I need an umbrella. The Taj Mahal is in India.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "वह एक teacher है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "The sun rises in the east yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: The sun rises in the east.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Articles (A, An, The).
tasks.hindiPrompt: Articles (A, An, The) का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I waited for an hour. The Ganges river is very sacred. He bought a car. The car is red.
